headline: Are You Richer Than You Think? Some 91% Of Millionaires Call Themselves 'Middle Class'
summary: Money has a funny way of moving the goalposts. Hit $1 million, and instead of feeling rich, many people just feel…comfortable. That disconnect shows up clearly in survey data from Ameriprise Financial in 2023. Even among investors who've already crossed...
